release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 58. Adds a full Local buzzer sounds section with configurable mute duration from 1 to 30 minutes, random or fixed audio mode, per-alarm buzzer selections, 30-second sound and 15-second pause cycle, and local buzzer test controls. Moves the active mute control into Current status and adds a live mute-time-remaining display. Retains alarm-episode snooze reset logic, midnight-to-midnight daily bolus totals, Nightscout SAGE and IOB/COB auto-read, centered night screen, Wi-Fi profile handling, caregiver WhatsApp routing, and consolidated web UI.
